info.name: ResumeForge Original API - Full Endpoint Tests
info.description: Postman collection generated from the original Express/TypeScript codebase. It exercises every declared endpoint in the original services project, including admin routes. AI and mailer-dependent requests are included but skipped by default via environment flags.

exec: pm.test('Signup returns token and user', function () {
pm.test('Login returns token and matching email', function () {
pm.test('Current user matches signed-up user', function () {
pm.test('Provider auth returns token and user', function () {
pm.test('Contact endpoint returns an id', function () {

request.description: Expected to return 200 on a healthy implementation. On the untouched original codebase this may fail with 500 because the JWT payload does not include req.user.name, but the route inserts it into a NOT NULL column.
